notFound.scanHint: Scanning for signals... No data fragments found.

error.heading: Something went wrong
error.description: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

toasts.playbackFailed: Playback failed to start. Please try again.
toasts.resumeUnavailable: Unable to resume - content data not available.
toasts.progressUnavailable: Unable to resume - progress data not available.
toasts.episodeMissing: Unable to resume - episode information missing.
toasts.episodeLoading: Please wait for the current episode to load
toasts.partyMissing: Unable to create party: Content details missing
toasts.partyFailed: Failed to create party room. Please try again.
toasts.soundboardAuth: You must be in the party to use the soundboard
toasts.hostTimeout: Watch party closed because the host did not return.
toasts.partyTimeLimit: Watch party has reached 3-hour limit and will now end.

welcome.title: Welcome to Nightwatch
welcome.description: Let us show you around your personal streaming companion. Synchronized playback, music, manga, and more.

search.title: Find Your Film
search.description: Search across 12k+ titles. Type your favorite movie or show here.

resume.title: Resume Watching
resume.description: Pick up right where you left off. Every frame saved.

live.title: Live Streams
live.description: Watch live streams and join live chat in real-time.

watchlist.title: Your Queue
watchlist.description: Save movies and episodes here to watch later.

library.title: Your Library
library.description: Browse your saved clips, recordings, and collected content all in one place.

music.title: Music
music.description: Stream music with synced lyrics, playlists, equalizer, crossfade, and Spotify Connect-like device transfer.

manga.title: Manga
manga.description: Read manga chapters with a smooth reader. Swipe through pages seamlessly.

askAi.title: Ask AI
askAi.description: Voice-to-voice AI assistant. Get recommendations, search content, or control playback hands-free.

profile.title: Profile & Settings
profile.description: Manage your account, security, preferences, and connected devices.

ready.title: You're All Set
ready.description: Enjoy the experience. No distractions, just content.

sidebar.title: Navigation
sidebar.description: Your main menu lives here. Hover the left edge anytime to open it.

friends.title: Friends & Voice Calls
friends.description: See who's online, start voice calls, and manage friend requests. Hover the right edge to open.

games.title: Games
games.description: Take a break with browser games. Play right inside Nightwatch.

mobileNav.title: Tap & Hold to Navigate
mobileNav.description: Long-press the logo to open navigation, or long-press your profile to see friends.

mobileSidebar.title: ← Swipe to Navigate
mobileSidebar.description: Swipe from the left edge to open this menu anytime. Home, Live, Music, Manga, and more.

mobileFriends.title: Friends Panel →
mobileFriends.description: Swipe from the right edge to see friends, online status, and start voice calls.

explore.title: Explore
explore.description: Social feed with posts, reactions, polls, and DMs. Connect with friends in real-time.

offline.title: You are Offline
offline.description: Nightwatch requires an internet connection to work.

metadata.homeDescription: Search for movies and TV shows to start watching together.
metadata.continueWatchingDescription: Pick up where you left off with your recently watched movies and TV shows.
metadata.searchDescription: Search for movies, TV shows, and anime.
metadata.profileDescription: Manage your profile and viewing history.
metadata.liveDescription: Watch live sports matches and channels with your friends in real-time.
metadata.watchlistDescription: Keep track of movies and TV shows you want to watch later.
metadata.userProfileDescription: View {name}'s watch activity and profile on Nightwatch.

desktopApp.notInstalledDesc: We could not open the Nightwatch Desktop app. Is it installed?

errors.userExists: An account with this email already exists.
errors.invalidInvite: Invite link is invalid or expired. Please request a new one.
errors.captchaFailed: Security verification failed. Please try again.
errors.otpRateLimit: Too many attempts. Please wait and try again.
errors.validationError: Some details are invalid. Please review and try again.
errors.csrfFailed: Security token expired. Please refresh the page.
errors.notFound: The requested resource was not found.
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action.
errors.requestTimeout: Request timed out. Please check your connection and try again.

landing.heroSubtitle: Synchronized playback, real-time watch parties, live streaming, voice calls, and messaging — all in one place.

watchTogether.title: Watch Together
watchTogether.desc: Synchronized playback with friends in real-time.

watchParties.title: Watch Parties
watchParties.desc: Video calls and shared controls over WebRTC.

goLive.title: Go Live
goLive.desc: Stream to your audience with RTMP and live chat.

sync.title: Synchronized Playback
sync.desc: Watch movies, shows, and videos perfectly in sync with anyone. Play, pause, and seek — everyone stays on the same frame.

party.title: Watch Parties
party.desc: Peer-to-peer video calls with shared controls. See reactions in real-time over WebRTC.

live.title: Go Live
live.desc: Stream with RTMP ingestion, HLS delivery, and real-time chat with your audience.

music.title: Music Streaming
music.desc: Gapless playback, synced lyrics, crossfade, equalizer, and device transfer.

voiceCalls.title: Friends & Voice Calls
voiceCalls.desc: Add friends, see who's online, and jump into crystal-clear voice calls instantly.

landing.downloadDesc: Available on all major platforms. Get the native experience.
landing.ctaDesc: Nightwatch is currently invite-only. Log in with your account to get started.

footer.disclaimer: Nightwatch does not host, store, upload, or distribute any media content. All content is sourced externally by users. The platform serves solely as a synchronization and communication layer. We are not responsible for any third-party content accessed through the platform.

clips.subtitle: Your clips and saved moments
clips.emptyDescription: Record moments from live streams to build your collection

gamesPage.heroDescription: Arcade classics right in your browser

search.hint: Use the letter grid to search for content

live.noChannelsHint: Live TV channels will appear here

watchlist.title: My Watchlist
watchlist.emptyHint: Browse content and add items to your watchlist

library.noClipsHint: Record moments from live streams to see them here

login.title: Sign in to Nightwatch
login.scanHint: Scan with your phone to sign in

dm.startConversation: Start a conversation with a friend
